chat_history.title: Chat History
chat_history.description: Stores user chat messages for the Gemini assistant per project.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who owns this chat history.

projectName.description: The name of the project this chat history belongs to.

messages.description: List of chat messages in this session.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the chat history was last updated.

chat_histories/{historyId}.description: Collection of chat histories indexed by userEmail_projectName
